Synthetic APK test fixtures for manifest security scanning.

Generated by `generate_apk_fixtures.py` — run inside the backend container:

    docker compose exec backend python tests/fixtures/apk/generate_apk_fixtures.py

Each APK has intentional manifest vulnerabilities for testing specific
MANIFEST-001 through MANIFEST-018 checks. See `apk_fixture_manifests.py`
for the manifest XML definitions.
